## Checklist

- [ ] `flake8 . --count --select=E9,F63,F7,F82 --show-source --statistics` passes with zero errors
- [ ] `poetry run pytest --cov=ssss` passes with 100% coverage

- [ ] No AI tool config files or instruction files are included (see `.gitignore`)
- [ ] Tests clean up any files or directories they create
